blended.narrative: Mount Snow is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,200 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
